channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Poilievre begins U.S. trip to discuss Canada-U.S. trade and automotive industry
item.description: Canada's Official Opposition leader, Conservative Pierre Poilievre, is embarking on a U.S. trip with a focus on the automotive industry and cross-border trade. He will begin in Windsor, Ontario, Canad...

item.title: Michigan synagogue attack suspect had family killed in recent Lebanon airstrike
item.description: Ayman Mohamad Ghazali, a 41-year-old naturalised US citizen originally from Lebanon, attempted to drive a vehicle into Temple Israel in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan, on Thursday afternoon. Secur...

item.title: Senator Karen Nyamu Highlights Modesty and Legislative Achievements During Embakasi Rally
item.description: During a lively campaign rally in Embakasi East, Nairobi, Senator Karen Nyamu made headlines not just for her political agenda but also for her choice of a modest outfit. The mother of four, who is ca...

item.title: U.S. Military Bases in the Middle East: A Tool of Imperial Control and Regional Instability
item.description: The article argues that the significant U.S. military presence in the Middle East forms a core element of American imperialist strategy in the region. Since the 1990s, intensified after the September ...

item.title: NDPC urges content creators to obtain consent before filming Nigerians
item.description: The National Data Protection Commission (NDPC) don give warning to all content creators wey dey film Nigerians without their permission. Dis warning follow wahala wey involve Lagos-based TikToker, Ell...

item.title: Mpumalanga school introduces robotics lab to improve digital literacy among learners
item.description: In a significant step to bridge the digital gap in South Africa, Siyifunile Secondary School in Dullstroom, Mpumalanga, has launched a robotics laboratory aimed at equipping learners with coding, robo...

item.title: DPWH accelerates Maharlika Highway repairs to reduce Holy Week traffic
item.description: The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) is expediting road reblocking along the Maharlika Highway to address expected traffic congestion during the upcoming Holy Week exodus. DPWH Secretary...

item.title: Beyond celebrations: The key debates on women’s rights that shaped this year’s International Women’s Day
item.description: The article reflects on how International Women’s Day in Kenya this year went beyond the usual glitz of galas and parties, to focus on hard conversations about gender equality, women’s rights and soci...

item.title: Trump Orders 5,000 Marines to Strait of Hormuz Amid Rising Tensions in Iran Conflict
item.description: The Trump administration has deployed 5,000 Marines to the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating tensions with Iran, following a series of deadly incidents. The deployment, authorised by Defence Secretary ...

item.title: DRI uncovers illegal Alprazolam production unit in Andhra Pradesh, seizes large quantity of drugs
item.description: In a significant enforcement action, the Directorate of Revenue Intelligence (DRI) conducted a raid at an unauthorised drug manufacturing unit located in the Kondapalli Industrial Development Area, NT...

item.title: Gaelic Warrior Claims Victory in 2026 Cheltenham Gold Cup
item.description: At the 2026 Cheltenham Festival, Gaelic Warrior triumphed in the Gold Cup, providing an unforgettable moment for jockey Paul Townend and owner Rich Ricci. Townend became the jockey with the most Gold ...

item.title: Zamfara Families Flee Village After Bandits Make Unreasonable Demands
item.description: For Mai Tukunya village inside Dansadau district, Maru LGA, Zamfara State, life don turn serious wahala as armed bandits don issue heavy demand for residents. Dem dey ask for N10 million, AK-47 rifle ...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh Cabinet Approves ₹9,355 Crore for Water, Social Welfare, and Development Projects
item.description: The Andhra Pradesh Cabinet, led by Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu, on Friday approved a total investment of ₹9,355 crore for seven Multi-Village Schemes (MVS) aimed at improving water security an...

item.title: 10 Wrinkle-Resistant Clothing Items Ideal for Frequent Travelers
item.description: For frequent travelers, managing wrinkles in clothing can be a major hassle. Jamie Davis Smith shares a personal guide to building a practical travel wardrobe that stays polished without the need for ...

item.title: Frida Amani Engages Tanzanian Students in Environmental Education and Music Mentorship
item.description: Tanzanian rapper and environmental advocate Frida Amani is now taking her message straight to secondary schools across the country. She recently launched a school outreach programme that combines musi...

item.title: Trump's Influence Over His Allies Illustrated Through a Peculiar Tradition
item.description: Marina Hyde’s article examines the unusual dynamic between Donald Trump and his close political allies, such as Marco Rubio, JD Vance, and defence secretary Pete Hegseth. The piece explores a peculiar...

item.title: Kenya Transfers Coffee Regulation and Research to Coffee Board
item.description: In a major shake-up of Kenya's coffee sector, President William Ruto has signed the Coffee Act, 2023 (Mediated Version) into law, transferring both regulatory and commercial functions from the Agricul...

item.title: Alex Johnston sets NRL try-scoring record at Allianz Stadium
item.description: Alex Johnston, the 31-year-old South Sydney winger, has cemented his place in NRL history by breaking the league’s all-time try-scoring record. During Friday night’s clash against long-standing rivals...

item.title: Impact of Middle East Tensions on Filipino Farmers and Fisherfolk
item.description: Filipino farmers and fisherfolk are experiencing financial and operational strain due to rising oil prices triggered by the US-Israeli conflict with Iran. Fuel costs for diesel and electricity, essent...

item.title: Ondo Poly Graduates Face Long Delays in Certificate Issuance
item.description: Plenty graduates wey finish from Rufus Giwa Polytechnic, Owo (RUGIPO) don dey vex as dem never fit collect their academic certificates even years after dem graduate. Some of these alumni don finish fr...
